  "findings": [
    "Brake hose is twisted during installation, which can cause fatigue, chafing, restricted fluid flow, or premature failure under pressure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen the brake hose fittings, realign the hose to remove all twists, and retorque to OEM specifications using the lay line as a visual guide."
  ],
  "rationale": "A twisted brake hose violates standard OEM specifications and FMVSS-adjacent shop practices because it introduces mechanical stress and potential flow restriction, posing a high risk of sudden brake system failure.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Brake Installation Specifications",
    "FMVSS 106 (Brake Hoses) alignment guidelines"
  ]
}
